scripts.dev:app: pnpm android:build && pnpm --filter @droid-webscr/agent build && concurrently --kill-others --names web,agent-watch,agent "pnpm --filter @droid-webscr/web dev" "pnpm --filter @droid-webscr/agent dev" "node apps/agent/dist/main.js"
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && pnpm test
scripts.test: vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts && node --test tools/workspace-foundation.test.mjs tools/android-emulator-verify.test.mjs
